form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months came from midfield and won by a long-neck at Armidale Ctry Cl1 March 29 over 1100m defeating Cosmolicious with 55.5kg at $101. Previously second-up 7th of 14 at Dubbo Super Mdn on September 29 2024 over 1400m, 5 len behind Check Your Six carrying 58kg at $9. Back in great shape and is likely to feature.
